horoscope: Mercury turns retrograde in your privacy sector today, dear Aries. Some of the decisions made and projects started in the last couple of weeks can require reconsideration, or there can be delays to handle in the coming weeks. Relying on your intuition may not be as natural, as both inner and outer "signals" are difficult to read, that is until you recognize that you are looking at things in new ways during this cycle that lasts until March 20th. It's time to redo and refine work that is already underway, journal, and backtrack over the past to find answers that were not obvious then but are entirely relevant now. Today favors quiet but purposeful activities. Emotional intelligence levels are very high now, and people are drawn to your friendly, healing vibes. It can be a time for putting extra love into what you're doing, and it's quite wonderful. Your confidence is natural and radiating.

Mercury begins its retrograde period that will last until March 20th, dear Taurus. Some recent ideas, plans, or decisions may face delays or require review and reconsideration. Friendships can be trickier to handle now, or there can be past acquaintances reappearing, and you might think about contacting an old friend--or someone wants to get in touch with you. Today, consider that you (and most others) are not seeing the full picture of a matter clearly, so it's better to reserve judgment. It's probably also best not to follow whims. Still, it's a good day to feel supported by others or to see where you stand on a work project. Working with others cooperatively fares much better than competitive activities right now. Your integrity shines through your gentle support.

Mercury turns retrograde today, dear Gemini, and will continue its retrograde until March 20th. It may be best to stick to projects that are already in the works rather than take on brand-new endeavors. Aim to be as flexible as you can with your schedule, as mix-ups are possible during this shift. However, look for opportunities in the coming weeks to make valuable refinements and changes. It can be a super period for looking to the past for answers on how to manage current responsibilities, as well as for observing trends. You can be reconsidering past plans and projects, or you're waiting for information to come in before pressing forward. Still, today is excellent for a better understanding of a relationship. Cooperating with others comes easily and helps you to gain an edge. You are unusually perceptive today, and your good understanding of people can be put to good use. A friendship may blossom, or a bond improves with special attention and small kindnesses.

Mercury turns retrograde today, dear Cancer, and there can be a tendency to miss important details or misunderstand instructions. If it's possible, hold off on major decision-making during the shift today. Now and until March 20th, you may have to review travel or educational plans, or there can be some mix-ups that introduce delays into your life. You'll benefit from taking a look at things from a new or different perspective. With Mercury's station today, there can be some tendency to mental clamor and nervousness as you consider your longer-range plans. While they're important to you, especially in the coming weeks, try to quieten the noise of overthinking and allow yourself also to feel what you want to do. You should be careful with how you express yourself through both the written and spoken word for now. Be clear in your communications, as misunderstandings are possible as Mercury changes direction. Save very important discussions for when people are less touchy and when you're clearer.  Fortunately, today's transits boost your dealings with others, even with communication issues, and you fare particularly well in one-to-one situations. Your spirit to learn and improve is strong, and motivation may very well be a special person in your life.

Mercury turns retrograde today, dear Leo, and will remain retrograde until March 20th. The tendency to miss vital instructions or details is strong right now, but as you grow accustomed to this cycle in the coming weeks, you'll find this period useful for reviewing and revising certain matters. You could discover that you're frequently turning to the past to understand the present, especially with intimate and financial matters, and it's a beneficial process. It's best to budget rather than do too much in the way of spending and borrowing in the weeks ahead. Consider that information can be incomplete for now, and it makes sense to focus on confidence-boosting activities. Look for new insights into a project or your studies today. There can be some tension building with a partner if you’re not understanding one another’s ideas or beliefs. You're exercising more faith in your attitude towards life in general, however.

Mercury begins its retrograde today, dear Virgo, and until March 20th, some of the things you've started or communicated recently might need some touching up. Fortunately, you may see a relationship from a different perspective in the coming weeks, but this shift is potentially confusing, particularly surrounding partnership matters, either personal or business, or both. Consider that delays can ultimately help you understand your situation! People from your past or past problems can take on a more prominent role in your life. Try not to focus on the words chosen to express ideas now, but instead on the intention behind them. Diplomacy is the way to go at the moment. The desire to improve and grow is strong today. As you approach others positively and warmly, you seem to receive the right responses from them.

This is a day in which Mercury's change of direction can make it difficult to feel at peace, dear Libra, but it's not impossible since yours is the sign of a peacemaker! This is a time for making your load lighter, not for taking on new projects. Mercury's retrograde until March 20th may serve to sway your thinking and change your mind about recent decisions. However, it has a special way of revealing details you previously overlooked. You might find that the refinements you make now will be very valuable later. Today, consider that you may be misinterpreting others' signals, and double-check your work. Organizing work or home affairs can be very rewarding and successful now. You’ll feel more in control of your life in general if you can take care of the smaller details and manage or improve routines and schedules today.

Watch for over-thinking creative and romantic matters today, dear Scorpio, which is a strong possibility with Mercury stationing retrograde. Follow your heart's desires rather than a script of what you think you should be doing. You do need to review and backtrack in these areas, but it's not as urgent as you might imagine. Mercury's retrograde lasts until March 20th, and it's a time to slow down, take stock, and review in-progress projects. Particularly during the transition, communication breakdowns are possible. The creative process might feel as if it's moving backwards, when in fact it's more of a realignment process. People--and problems--from the past tend to come back or become a mental/emotional preoccupation in your life during this cycle. Today is nevertheless a good time for personal magnetism. You can feel quite a sense of mission or deep satisfaction from helping someone or from your work and routines.

Mercury is retrograde starting today, dear Sagittarius, and until March 20th, this cycle can help you see your life from a new perspective, particularly your personal life, family, and home. Past errors can crop up today, or you might feel vaguely guilty about a responsibility you haven't fulfilled. Instead of stressing over it, take advantage of the time you have now to reevaluate things. You could find an error or an inconsistency that needs correcting. Communication with family may not be as straightforward as you'd like, or there can be some level of chaos or mechanical problems around the home that require your attention. Past issues can resurface for review. New initiatives surrounding home and property may be better left for a different time, but reworking and reorganizing your home can be especially fruitful now. Getting along well with others helps your mood. You're ready to pour extra love into a project, and nurturing a person or project can be where you're shining today.

Mercury turns retrograde today, dear Capricorn, and will continue in this apparent backward motion until March 20th. Some of the new work or endeavors started recently may come up for review. Matters related to studies, transportation, and essential communications can involve some confusion or backtracking. Vital information may be missed or missing, as it's not yet available. However, through delays or mishaps, you might discover new ways to express yourself that wouldn't have come to mind otherwise. This is, in fact, a powerful time for reviewing and revising work already in progress. Still, today's energies seem to encourage you to gain strength and a sense of purpose from your idealism and integrity. Your support of others, whether practical or emotional (and perhaps a healthy dose of both), is unique and appreciated.

Mercury turns retrograde today, dear Aquarius, and this retrograde cycle will last until March 20th. There may be a change of mind or interest, and possibly even a bit of regret when it comes to those things said or begun right now, so take your time during this transition. This Mercury retrograde occurs in your sector of assets, and now and in the coming three-plus weeks, there may be a need to review your finances or budget. It's a time to look to the past for answers to current problems or to delay some matters while you make changes and refinements. Take the time to rethink your sources of income or how you spend during this period, but put off finalizing anything significant for now. Today, try not to be too offhand with communications, expecting others to get your meaning, because Mercury turning retrograde can create a heavier atmosphere in which communications are taken a little more seriously and not necessarily correctly.

Mercury turns retrograde in your sign today, dear Pisces, and there may be a need to look to the past for answers before pushing forward. Watch for talking about something prematurely, as conversations and interactions can be tricky temporarily. Some personal plans may stall or appear to move backward when, in fact, they can benefit from review. While there may be some mix-ups in communication today, the cycle itself, lasting until March 20th, is strong for allowing your heart to catch up with your mind if it's been running ahead. Decision-making turns inward, and intuition often reigns over pure logic, which can be quite beneficial in spots. It's a good time to reorganize and reflect. You are looking at the world a little differently, through different filters, and can come up with some very important inner revelations.
